customPanel.addBuffDescription: Add only to the current monitor area text block
customPanel.addCounterDescription: Counters are also globally unique and can only belong to one monitor area.
customPanel.currentGroupDescription: Entries in this area are shown in the overlay as an independent text block and can be dragged and resized separately.
customPanel.emptyState: There are no custom monitor areas yet. Click “New Monitor Area” above first, then add buffs or counters.
customPanel.noEntries: No entries in the current monitor area
customPanel.selectOrCreate: Please select or create a monitor area
customPanel.sharedStyleDescription: All custom monitor areas share the following text and progress bar styles.
customPanel.subtitle: Create multiple text monitor areas. The same buff or counter is globally unique across all areas.
customPanel.title: Custom Monitor Areas
progressColor: Color de la barra de progreso
progressOpacity: Opacidad de la barra de progreso
